case_title: SERBELLON, MARINA vs. GARDUNO, DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: ALDO L. LUZARDI, EXECUTOR FRED CAMPAGNOLI, ESQ. OF THE WILL OF PAOLO AGAZZI ALIAS DECEASED. VS. DANNY NARANJO ETC. IN PRO PER 3:00 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF, ALDO L. LUZARDI EXECUTOR OF THE WILL OF PAOLO AGAZZI, ALIAS DECEASED AND AGAINST DEFENDANT DANNY NARANJO FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AT 2427 FOLSOM STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. STAY EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT THROUGH 12:00 P.M. ON 9/5/93. IF DEFENDANT IS NOT OUT BY 9/5/93, PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY FOR A WRIT OF EXECUTION AND EVICT THE DEFENDANT BY EXECUTING ON THE WRIT. ANY AND ALL SUBTANTS OR OTHER RESIDENTS MUST ALSO BE OUT OF SAID PREMISE BY THE 9/5/93 12:00 P.M. DEADLINE. PRO TEM JUDGE MARY ELLEN WISS, PRESIDING. REPORTED BY SANDRA NAYLOR.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERBELLON, MARINA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-15-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-20-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KAPLAN, THERESA (AS CLAIMANT)
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERBELLON, MARINA SERVED JUN-08-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 KAPLAN, THERESA (AS CLAIMANT)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERBELLON, MARINA SERVED JUN-09-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARDUNO, DAVID

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAPLAN, THERESA (AS CLAIMANT) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 766 THORNTON AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL AUG-15-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. TO PAY DEFT $450.00 AT THE LATEST BY 8/15/93 AT 5:00 P.M. AT SUCH TIME DEFENDANT WILL TURN OVER THE KEYS TO THE PREMISE UPON RECEIPT OF THE $450. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS

DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/ATTY. DEF. TEREZA CAPLAND PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEFAULT PREVIOUSLY ENTERED AS TO DAVID GARDUNO. SETTLED BY STIP W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - REST OF PREMISES AT 766 THORNTON AVE. - FORF. RENTAL AGREEMENT - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 8-15-93 - UPON RETURN OF KEYS TO PL. AGENT FRANK AYALA, PL TO PAY DEF $450 - MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS - UPON VACATING PL WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM AS TO CAPLAND & GARDUNO.
